---
name: Bug report
about: Reproducible defect in sillok
title: "[bug] <short summary>"
labels: type:bug
assignees: ''
---

## Reproduction

Minimal command or snippet that triggers the bug:

```bash
# e.g.
sillok route "..."
```

## Expected

What you expected to happen.

## Actual

What actually happened (paste output, stack trace, or screenshot).

## Environment

- sillok version: `pip show sillok | grep Version`
- Python: `python --version`
- OS: macOS / Ubuntu / Windows-WSL2 + version
- Client (if MCP): Claude Code / Codex CLI / Gemini CLI / Cursor / Continue / Claude Desktop / Codex Desktop / other

## Additional context

Logs, config (`.sillok/config.toml` redacted), or anything else relevant.
